name: automationtest
description: Reusable Playwright automation project for support roster browser smoke and permission tests.

scripts.test: npm run restart:services && npm run precheck && npm run test:raw
scripts.test:smoke: npm run restart:services && npm run precheck && npm run test:smoke:raw
scripts.test:validation: npm run restart:services && npm run precheck && npm run test:validation:raw
scripts.test:headed: npm run restart:services && npm run precheck && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:ui: npm run restart:services && npm run precheck && playwright test --ui
